# State 48 Cleaning Services

> Veteran-owned air duct cleaning and home cleaning company serving the Greater Phoenix, AZ metro area. Specializes in HVAC duct cleaning, dryer vent cleaning, carpet cleaning, house cleaning, and tile & grout cleaning.

## Business Information

- **Phone**: (602) 562-2040
- **Email**: State48cleaningservices@gmail.com
- **Address**: 411 E Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85012
- **Hours**: Open daily, closes 9 PM
- **Service Area**: Greater Phoenix, AZ metro (Phoenix and surrounding cities)
- **Website**: https://www.statecleaning4you.com

## Services

- **Air Duct & HVAC Cleaning** — Full cleaning of supply and return ducts, registers, vent covers, and dryer vents using industrial vacuum and rotary brush systems
- **Dryer Vent Cleaning** — Removes dangerous lint buildup, a leading cause of residential fires
- **Carpet Cleaning** — Deep-clean, deodorize, and restore carpets using professional hot-water extraction equipment
- **House Cleaning** — Complete top-to-bottom residential cleaning including countertops, bathrooms, and kitchens
- **Tile & Grout Cleaning** — Precision steam cleaning for tile floors, showers, and backsplashes

## About

State 48 Cleaning Services is a veteran-owned and operated cleaning company based in Phoenix, AZ. Founded on the values of military service — integrity, discipline, and an unwavering commitment to excellence — the company brings that same dedication to every home and business in the Greater Phoenix area. Fully insured with transparent, no-surprise pricing.

## Ratings & Trust

- 4.9 stars — Google Reviews
- 4.8 stars — HomeAdvisor
- 4.9 stars — Trustindex.io
